name: shipeasy
description: Shipeasy for Claude Code — one plugin, all features. SDK install + auth, feature gates / configs / kill switches, A/B experiments, in-app bug reports, i18n. Run `/shipeasy:install` first, then any of `/shipeasy:bugs:install`, `/shipeasy:flags:install`, `/shipeasy:experiments:install`, `/shipeasy:i18n:install`.

plugins.name: shipeasy
plugins.description: Single plugin with every Shipeasy capability. Slash-command namespaces: `/shipeasy:install` (base setup, run first), then `/shipeasy:bugs:*`, `/shipeasy:flags:*`, `/shipeasy:experiments:*`, `/shipeasy:i18n:*`. Each install command also drops a thin pointer skill into the project's `.claude/skills/` so new contributors can re-onboard without already having the plugin loaded.
